one_line_ask: Turn SentinelMesh's raw screen recordings, product b-roll, scratch voiceover, logo, and brand color reference into a polished 90-120s AI-cybersecurity SaaS demo cut plus a 30s promo cutdown and 15s teaser (with a vertical social reframe), clean the VO, and build on-brand lower-third / call-out / graded end-card graphic plates and a vector logo — all packaged onto a Firefly board for the Premiere handoff.
brief:
SentinelMesh is a B2B AI-powered cybersecurity platform that helps organizations reduce human cyber risk through real-time protection, adaptive phishing simulations, and in-the-moment learning nudges. We're preparing our next funding round and a website refresh, and we need a polished marketing and product-demonstration video plus social cutdowns. The finished pieces will run on our website hero, in sales decks, webinars, investor discussions, and across LinkedIn / X. We already have a strong foundation of material and want an editor to turn it into a professional, modern B2B SaaS product video (product footage + motion graphics + animated callouts + captions and visual storytelling — NOT a cartoon-style explainer).

Source material we're supplying: (1) two 1080p screen-capture recordings of the SentinelMesh console — the real-time threat dashboard and the adaptive-simulation builder; (2) a short b-roll clip of the product running on a laptop in a modern office; (3) a scratch voiceover WAV of our narration script, recorded in a noisy room, that needs cleaning before it can carry the edit; (4) our logo as a flat PNG; (5) a neutral, ungraded end-card hero still with negative space fo
